fields.title: [workflow][session-worktree] Add worktree-first session guidance and hooks
[workflow][session-worktree] Add worktree-first session guidance and hooks

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Guidance requires session-backed worktree resolution before board check-in or edits. 2. Hooks/startup helpers consume the authoritative path from session-api. 3. Guidance documents reuse vs rotation, with rotation as the default handoff path. 4. Stop/handoff hooks capture context without reassigning ownership. 5. Focused validation proves new sessions land in the assigned worktree.
